message:
Running command: MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

echo "=== Verify fix: compute_ss instantiation in wrapper ==="
awk 'NR>=2360 && NR<=2405' "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"

echo ""
echo "=== Check: no remaining JTAG port references in wrapper ==="
grep -n "\.tck\|\.tms\|\.tdi\|\.trst_n" "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v" && echo "FOUND JTAG refs (bad)" || echo "No JTAG port refs (good)"

echo ""
echo "=== Check: SWD ports now present ==="
grep -n "\.swclk\|\.swdi\|\.swdo\|\.halted" "$MCU_DIR/verilog/rtl/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.v"
